mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `comment` ( resourceId, userId, content, createdAt ) VALUES ( #{resourceId}, #{userId}, #{content}, #{createdAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT c.id, c.resourceId, c.userId, u.username AS userName, c.content, c.createdAt FROM `comment` c INNER JOIN `user` u ON u.userId = c.userId WHERE c.id = #{id} LIMIT 1

SELECT c.id, c.resourceId, c.userId, u.username AS userName, c.content, c.createdAt FROM `comment` c INNER JOIN `user` u ON u.userId = c.userId WHERE c.resourceId = #{resourceId} ORDER BY c.createdAt DESC, c.id DESC

SELECT c.id, c.resourceId, c.userId, c.content, c.createdAt FROM `comment` c WHERE c.resourceId = #{resourceId} AND c.userId = #{userId} AND c.content = #{content} ORDER BY c.createdAt DESC, c.id DESC LIMIT 1
